title: DEVITALIZING AGENTS USED IN THE TREATMENT OF PULPITIS IN CHILDREN
author: Imanov E.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Despite numerous studies conducted in different countries, the treatment of complications of dental caries, in particular pulpitis, remains an important and pressing problem in pediatric dentistry. Treatment of dental pulpitis in children is a complex and responsible task in the practical work of a dentist, whose goal is to quickly eliminate pain, prevent the development of the inflammatory process in the periodontium of the tooth and preserve its functional value.
